articles.title: Ellyse Perry runs the show as Australia brush past Pakistan
articles.description: Beth Mooney twice shrugs off dislocated finger to be involved in five dismissals

articles.title: Carter hopes for more cricket after Scotland threaten T20 World Cup upsets
articles.description: After going winless in four matches in the 2024 T20 World Cup, Scotland beat Ireland, and ran WI and NZ close in 2026

articles.title: Unchanged Australia bat first at Headingley against Pakistan
articles.description: Pakistan, without a win and knocked out of the T20 World Cup, made two changes, bringing back Diana Baig and Rameen Shamim

articles.title: Stokes, Atkinson among four changes as England name Trent Bridge XI
articles.description: Robinson sits out despite being passed fit, as Jamie Smith also returns after paternity leave

articles.title: Athapaththu ton revives SL's semi-final hopes
articles.description: Athapaththu's innings raised SL's NRR to less than negative one, with Scotland still to play, and other matches remaining in the group

articles.title: Morris mows through Essex to lift struggling Lancashire
articles.description: Career-best 6 for 27 puts seal on emphatic 153-run win over bottom club Essex

articles.title: Phillips, Kelly keep table-topping Blaze on track
articles.description: Yorkshire bundled out for 150 before home side wrap up chase with 20 overs to spare

articles.title: Levick, Villiers, Armitage star as Durham overwhelm Surrey
articles.description: Graham plays key supporting role as hosts overcome wobble to cruise to six-wicket win

articles.title: McCullum on Stokes' return: 'Ben and I are tight'
articles.description: Head coach plays down talk of broken relationship after captain was stood down for second Test

articles.title: Unbeaten England and West Indies eye semi-final berth

articles.title: Women's T20 World Cup 2026: SL W vs IRE W Today's Match Highlights: Unmissable video recap, POTM, match analysis, stats and more
articles.description: Sri Lanka beat Ireland by nine wickets to keep their slim chance of reaching the semi-finals alive.

articles.title: Zimbabwe name squad for Bangladesh Test, Richard Ngarava appointed as captain
articles.description: Zimbabwe Cricket (ZC) has announced a 15-member squad for the upcoming one-off Test match against Bangladesh, with Richard Ngarava appointed as captain.

articles.title: 'Felt like he could hit any ball anywhere' - Jofra Archer names toughest batter he has bowled against
articles.description: The pair have met in eight IPL innings, with Rahul holding a favourable record against Archer. He has scored 108 runs in 73 balls, striking at 147.94.

articles.title: Should CSK stick to Stephen Fleming as head coach?
articles.description: After a few underwhelming seasons, some fans and experts believe that it is time Chennai Super Kings shows the door to current head coach Stephen Fleming and brings someone else into the role.

articles.title: Women's T20 World Cup 2026: NZ W vs SCO W Today's Match Highlights: Unmissable video recap, POTM, match analysis, stats and more
articles.description: New Zealand Women beat Scotland Women by six wickets at the County Ground in Bristol on Tuesday, June 23, to keep their hopes of reaching the semi-final alive.

articles.title: Parth Jindal posts emotional farewell message for Kuldeep Yadav after DC-LSG trade deal finalised
articles.description: The other side of the deal sees wicketkeeper-batter Rishabh Pant make a sensational return to the capital, after two dismal years at the helm in Lucknow.

articles.title: 'She quit her job' - Suryansh Shedge credits parents' sacrifice after receiving maiden India call-up
articles.description: The all-rounder was picked as an injury replacement for Nitish Kumar Reddy for the seven matches India will play in the shortest format in Europe.

articles.title: Rohit Sharma conferred with Padma Shri for outstanding contribution to Indian cricket
articles.description: Rohit Sharma has led India to 2024 T20 World Cup and 2025 Champions Trophy title.
